steps.name: Given backend teams are prepared (WeLikeCalls + IJoinCalls) with owners and members
And WeLikeCalls team owner creates GroupVideoCall conversation with team members
And participant devices and unique username are prepared for group call
And team owners for WeLikeCalls and IJoinCalls are resolved
And conference calling is enabled for WeLikeCalls and IJoinCalls via backdoor
And I see welcome screen before login
And I open staging deep link login flow
And I login as WeLikeCalls team owner
And I complete post-login permission and privacy prompts
And I verify GroupVideoCall conversation is visible and start new conversation flow
And I open people search to find TeamOwnerB
And I search TeamOwnerB by unique username
And I verify TeamOwnerB appears in search results and open profile
